mapper.sql: id, plan_id, item_id, loaded, container_instance_id, layer_index, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, swap_length_width, support_rate
mapper.update: UPDATE plan_item_detail SET plan_id = #{planId}, item_id = #{itemId}, loaded = #{loaded}, container_instance_id = #{containerInstanceId}, layer_index = #{layerIndex}, pos_x = #{posX}, pos_y = #{posY}, pos_z = #{posZ}, swap_length_width = #{swapLengthWidth}, support_rate = #{supportRate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM plan_item_detail WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY id
